title: BAM - Brand Art Media ransomware incident

extortion.description: bam.lu zoominfo.com/c/bam---brand-art-media/372530213 BAMHUB MEDIA is a tech and design agency that offers a wide range of services including website and app design, software development, 3D design, and branding. They specialize in expo branding, providing end-to-end exhibition services from design to logistics, successfully executing projects in Europe and the USA.
